name: Great Plains Software, Inc.
description: Great Plains Software, Inc. was an independent provider of mid-market business management software solutions, including financial management, distribution, manufacturing, project accounting, human resources, and customer relationship management. Founded in 1981 and headquartered in Fargo, North Dakota, the company became widely known for its Great Plains Dynamics and eEnterprise products. In 2001, Great Plains Software was acquired by Microsoft Corporation for approximately $1.1 billion, subsequently becoming the foundation for Microsoft Business Solutions and the Microsoft Dynamics GP product line.
